tuv.seg: By opting in to receive emails you state that you are okay with Mozilla handling this info as explained in Mozilla’s <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>.
Ñukanchik chaskillikunata chaskishpaka Mozilla kikinpa yachaykunata allilla apanchunmi nikunki imahinami nikun kay <privacyLink> shinallata Privacy Policy nishkapi</privacyLink>.
Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required.
I'd like to receive emails such as goal reminders, my progress updates and newsletters about Common Voice.
Ñuka munayman ruray paktachikunata chaskinkapak, ñuka chayra rurashkakunatapash shinallata mushuk willachikunatapash.
Join the Common Voice mailing list
Receive emails such as challenge and goal reminders, progress updates, and newsletters about Common Voice.
Ruray paktachik chaskillita kachamuway, ñuka chayra rurashkakunatapah shinallata Common Voice mushuk ruraskakunatapash willachi.
Sorry, Common Voice is running slowly. Thanks for your interest.
Kishpichiway, Common Voice allillami llankakun.Kikinpa munayta yupaychani.

Thank you for your interest in contributing to { $lang }. We work hard to get every language ready for launch and keep the teams updated via email. If you want to contribute, please provide your email below.

Yupaychani kikimpa { $lang } shimita yanapankapa munayta. Ñukanchikka sinchitami llankanakunchi tukuylla shimikunata charinkapa shinallata riksichinkapa. Ñukanchikka mail nishkawanmi llankanchi. Shinaka kikin yanapankapa munashpaka, mail nishkata kachamuy urapi.
Upload of this clip keeps failing at server. Reload the page or try again later.
kay uyachikka servidor nishkapi man allirachu. Kutin pankata paskay na chayta shinashpaka kutin ruray kipalla.
Upload of this clip keeps failing, keep retrying?
Kay uyachik wisachikka mana allichu, kutin shinasharachu
We at Mozilla are building a community around voice technology. We would like to stay in touch with updates, new data sources and to hear more about how you're using this data.

Morzillapika shuk ayllullaktata shinanakunchik shimikunata ñawpaman apankapa. Mushuk ruraykunata kikinman willachinkapa munanchik, mushuk riksichikunatapash shinallata yachankapa munanchik ima shina kay yachaykunawan llankakunkita.
We at Mozilla are building a community around voice technology. We would like to stay in touch with updates, new data sources and to hear more about how you're using this data.

Morzillapika shuk ayllullaktata shinanakunchik shimikunata ñawpaman apankapa. Mushuk ruraykunata kikinman willachinkapa munanchik, mushuk riksichikunatapash shinallata yachankapa munanchik ima shina kay yachaykunawan llankakunkita.
We promise to handle your information with care. Read more in our <privacyLink>Privacy Notice</privacyLink>.
Ñukanchik kikimpa riksichita allitami allchipashun. Ashtawan yachankapa munashpaka, kaypi llapi<privacyLink> Pipakakta willachi</privacyLink>.
We promise to handle your information with care. Read more in our <privacyLink>Privacy Notice</privacyLink>.
Ñukanchik kikimpa riksichita allitami allchipashun. Ashtawan yachankapa munashpaka, kaypi llapi<privacyLink> Pipakakta willachi</privacyLink>.
We're receiving a lot of traffic and are currently investigating the issues.
Ashtaka mañaykunatami charinchik chaymantami llakita allichinkapa mashkanakunchi.
We will be in touch with more information as it becomes available.
Saruk punchakunapi kikinman willachishun imata shinanata.
Yes, send me emails. I’d like to stay informed about the Common Voice Project.
Ari, chaskillita kachamuylla. Common Voice llankaykunamanta yachankapa munanimi.
Yes, send me emails. I'd like to stay informed about the progress of this language on Common Voice.
Ari, chaskillita kallamuylla. Ñukaka munashami yachankapa imashina kay shimi ñawpaman katikukta Common Voice pankapi.
You've successfully signed up for contributing to { $language }. Thank you.
Sumak ña killkarishkanki { $language } shimita yanapankapa. Yupaychani
Please select the home page you wish to use:
Tsirpayupa kallarinata akllapay ima munashkata shinay\u0020
Kunanpachakta witishka. Puchuk wallpata urahuchina aparinkapa
Update failed. <label data-l10n-name="failed-link">Download the latest version</label>
Kunanpachakta witishka. <label data-l10n-name="failed-link">Puchuk wallpata urahuchina aparinkapa</label>
Updates disabled by your system administrator
You are currently not in a private window.
Kunanpi kanka na shuk shukllayay tukupi kankichu.
You are currently on the <label data-l10n-name="current-channel">{ $channel }</label> update channel.
You are currently on the <label data-l10n-name="current-channel"></label> update channel.
